## User Story
As a product user, I want to securely authenticate with the system so that my data remains private and only accessible to authorized users.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] User can sign up with email and password
- [ ] User can log in with credentials
- [ ] Sessions last for 24 hours
- [ ] Password reset functionality works
- [ ] Multi-factor authentication option available

## Technical Tasks
- [[Implement Authentication]]
- [[Write Integration Tests]]

## Risk Assessment
Security is critical. May require security audit before launch.

## Definition of Done
- Code reviewed by security team
- All tests passing
- Documentation complete
- Production deployment approved
